bulletinBlurb: Join the Neighborhood Zine Studio at Maple Corner Library Terrace Room on May 14 at 6:30 PM or May 16 at 11:00 AM. Create one-page zines about local spots using provided materials. Capacity is 18.
newsletterSnippet: Make mini zines about your neighborhood at Maple Corner Library on May 14 or 16. Materials provided; space limited to 18 participants.
publicSummary: This workshop offers a creative, hands-on opportunity to make and share mini zines about local favorites, fostering community connection.
